name: Time Series Features
description: This node computes various time-series related features from a DataFrame containing transactional data.
input: It takes a DataFrame with user, date, and optionally amount, item, and category columns.
output: Returns the original DataFrame with new time-series feature columns appended.

fields.name: userCol
fields.title: User ID Column
fields.description: Column representing the user or entity ID.

fields.name: dateCol
fields.title: Date/Timestamp Column
fields.description: Column representing the transaction date or timestamp.

fields.name: amountCol
fields.title: Amount Column
fields.description: Column representing the transaction amount (optional).

fields.name: itemCol
fields.title: Item Column
fields.description: Column representing the item purchased (optional).

fields.name: categoryCol
fields.title: Category Column
fields.description: Column representing the transaction category (optional).

fields.name: enable_days_since_last_transaction
fields.title: Enable Days Since Last Transaction
fields.description: Calculates the time elapsed since the user's last transaction.

fields.name: days_since_last_transaction_unit
fields.title: Unit
fields.description: Time unit for calculation.

fields.name: enable_days_until_next_transaction
fields.title: Enable Days Until Next Transaction
fields.description: Calculates the time remaining until the user's next transaction.

fields.name: days_until_next_transaction_unit
fields.title: Unit
fields.description: Time unit for calculation.

fields.name: enable_transaction_hour
fields.title: Enable Transaction Hour
fields.description: Extracts the hour from the transaction timestamp.

fields.name: enable_transaction_day_of_week
fields.title: Enable Transaction Day of Week
fields.description: Extracts the day of the week from the transaction timestamp.

fields.name: transaction_day_of_week_start
fields.title: Week Start Day
fields.description: Select the day to be considered as the start of the week (0).

fields.name: enable_transaction_day_of_month
fields.title: Enable Transaction Day of Month
fields.description: Extracts the day of the month from the transaction timestamp.

fields.name: enable_week_of_year
fields.title: Enable Week of Year
fields.description: Extracts the week of the year from the transaction timestamp.

fields.name: enable_is_weekend
fields.title: Enable Is Weekend
fields.description: Creates a binary flag indicating if the transaction occurred on a weekend.

fields.name: enable_is_month_start
fields.title: Enable Is Month Start
fields.description: Creates a binary flag if the transaction is at the start of the month.

fields.name: month_start_days
fields.title: Start Days
fields.description: Number of days from the start of the month to consider.

fields.name: enable_is_month_end
fields.title: Enable Is Month End
fields.description: Creates a binary flag if the transaction is at the end of the month.

fields.name: month_end_days
fields.title: End Days
fields.description: Day of the month from which to consider the end (e.g., 28 for last 3 days of Feb).

fields.name: enable_time_since_first_transaction
fields.title: Enable Time Since First Transaction
fields.description: Calculates the time elapsed since the user's very first transaction.

fields.name: time_since_first_transaction_unit
fields.title: Unit
fields.description: Time unit for calculation.

fields.name: enable_time_of_day_bin
fields.title: Enable Time of Day Bin
fields.description: Categorizes transactions into 'night', 'morning', 'afternoon', and 'evening'.

fields.name: enable_season
fields.title: Enable Season
fields.description: Assigns a season ('winter', 'spring', 'summer', 'autumn') to each transaction based on the month.

fields.name: enable_avg_time_between_txns
fields.title: Enable Average Time Between Transactions
fields.description: Calculates the average time between a user's transactions.

fields.name: avg_time_between_txns_unit
fields.title: Unit
fields.description: Time unit for calculation.

fields.name: enable_rolling_transaction_count
fields.title: Enable Rolling Transaction Count
fields.description: Counts the number of transactions in a rolling window.

fields.name: rolling_transaction_count_window
fields.title: Window Size (days)
fields.description: Window size for the rolling count.

fields.name: enable_rolling_amount_mean
fields.title: Enable Rolling Amount Mean (Required field : Amount)
fields.description: Computes a rolling average of transaction amounts over a defined window

fields.name: rolling_amount_mean_window
fields.title: Window Size (days)
fields.description: Window size for the rolling mean.

fields.name: enable_days_since_last_same_item
fields.title: Enable Days Since Last Same Item (Required field : Item)
fields.description: Calculates time since the last purchase of the same item

fields.name: days_since_last_same_item_unit
fields.title: Unit
fields.description: Time unit for calculation.

fields.name: enable_days_since_last_same_category
fields.title: Enable Days Since Last Same Category (Required field : Category)
fields.description: Calculates time since the last purchase in the same category.

fields.name: days_since_last_same_category_unit
fields.title: Unit
fields.description: Time unit for calculation.
